{{Infobox character
| name = Herald of Redmoon Hall
| species = Remnant
| abilities = {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|waves of bloody needles}}
| titles = {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Herald of Redmoon Hall]], [[Redmoon]]}}{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|, Remnant Redmoon}}
| appears_in = Cradle
| introduced = [[Wintersteel (novel)|Wintersteel]]
}}

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|The [[Herald]] of [[Redmoon Hall]], who insists on being called [[Redmoon]], is a leader of the [[Redmoon Hall]] sect. He possesses an immense ego and maintains a massive, cavernous audience hall within the sect's mobile cloudship headquarters. Physically, he is characterized by a scarlet complexion, including bright red hair and crimson eyes, with white Goldsigns resembling milk tears flowing from his eyes. He was formerly the [[Blood Shadow]] of the [[Sage]] known as [[Red Faith]], and a [[Heart]]'s Gem—a supreme source of blood [[aura]]—was created from the [[Herald]]'s own blood. [[Redmoon]] is described as a failed clone of [[Red Faith]], and the two share a complex relationship involving a past union where the [[Herald]] believed the mind should remain superior to the body.}}

== Wintersteel ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|The [[Herald of Redmoon Hall]] strikes with waves of bloody needles.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c27">''Wintersteel'', chapter 27</ref>}}

== Reaper ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|Formerly known as the [[Remnant]] [[Redmoon]], this entity is also identified simply as [[Redmoon]]. Within their union, the [[Herald]] of [[Redmoon Hall]] serves as the physical body to the mind of the [[Red Faith]]. This being possesses pink skin, crimson eyes, and scarlet hair, with white Goldsigns trailing from the corners of his eyes. Despite this power, he is unable to follow through space.}}

{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|The [[Herald of Redmoon Hall]] is also known as [[Redmoon]].<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c7">''Reaper'', chapter 7</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|The [[Herald of Redmoon Hall]] is the body to [[Red Faith]]'s mind in their union.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c7" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|The [[Herald of Redmoon Hall]] was formerly the [[Remnant]] [[Redmoon]].<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c7" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|The [[Herald of Redmoon Hall]] has scarlet hair, pink skin, and crimson eyes.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c7" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|The [[Herald of Redmoon Hall]] has white Goldsigns trailing from the corners of his eyes.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c7" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|The [[Herald of Redmoon Hall]] cannot follow through space.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c7" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:Wintersteel]]
[[Category:Reaper]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle characters]]
[[Category:Titled characters]]
[[Category:Remnants]]
